Department of Justice Data

December 1994
Crime & JusticeData & DatabasesGovernment & Politics

The National Criminal Justice Reference Service (NCJRS) launched a new online gopher service providing access to information from multiple Office of Justice agencies including juvenile justice, victim services, and crime statistics resources.

The National Criminal Justice Reference Service (NCJRS) recently announced its new online service. The new gopher provides users with an overview of the NCJRS and Office of Justice agencies including: The Office of Juvenile Justice and Delinquency Prevention; the Office of Victims of Crime; the Bureau of Justice Statistics Clearinghouse; and the Drugs and Crime Data Center Clearinghouse. The URL is: gopher://ncjrs.aspensys.com:77
